summary: M400 — Hotfix: defensive try/catch on Character Builder steps + iOS Chrome pull-to-refresh on the title screen + Silas conversation moved to the actual first dialog node + buckler fix in build-aware loot. New Game flow on iPhone falls through to a safe step instead of black-screening if any single render throws (and logs the error). TitleScreen toggles overscroll on so iOS Chrome pull-to-refresh works on the main menu, off when entering the game so combat taps don't accidentally refresh.
